note: RL-004 — Secrets audit. The background subagent tasks (cartographer, convention-scout, historian, scout) all completed and returned comprehensive results. The task_board() output was helpful but excessively large (truncated at 8KB+). The git history search was valuable. The session_diff tool returned inflated stats likely from other sessions' changes. Overall the tools worked well for this audit-focused lane, but I noticed that read_source with summary_only often misses the most relevant code sections — I needed to use focus= and content_tail/content_head to find critical content.
